archetype_reasoning: 276 resolved geo trades with 94.9% accuracy at avg price 0.080 and only 5% contested entries. This is a YIELD_HARVESTER operating in the reverse direction: instead of buying near-certainty YES tokens (0.92-0.99), this trader buys the equivalent cheap NO/opposite tokens at 0.08 average — effectively betting against highly unlikely events at prices equivalent to near-certainty (the other side of the trade is 0.92). Iran_ME: 159 trades at 0.067 avg, 97% accuracy; Trump_US: 72 trades at 0.008 avg, 100% accuracy. The 94.9% win rate at such low prices is the mathematical inverse of buying near-certainty: buying at 0.08 = opposite side is at 0.92. This is yield harvesting from the other direction. Realized_pnl=$0 exactly triggers the STR-003 PNL exclusion filter.
domain_blindspots: All domains: trades at avg 0.08 (opposite-direction yield harvesting) — not genuine forecasting in any domain
domain_summary: The apparent domain accuracy is a measurement artifact of yield harvesting from the cheap-side. Buying the cheap end (0.05-0.10) of near-certainty markets and winning 94.9% of the time is not forecasting skill — it is collecting residual yield on events that are widely understood to be near-impossible. No signal value in any domain.
signal_weight_reasoning: Yield harvester in reverse direction (buying cheap-side tokens on near-certainty markets). Realized_pnl=$0 exactly also triggers STR-003 PNL exclusion filter (non-redemption or redemption-only account). No forecasting signal in positions. EXCLUDE permanently.

realized_pnl=$0 exactly — STR-003 PNL filter blocks any signal use

risk_patterns: Systematic reverse yield harvesting: collecting cheap premiums on near-impossible events. Edge is real but carries tail risk (if any 'impossible' event resolves YES, all cheap-side positions on it lose)
100% Trump_US accuracy at 0.008 avg price is not forecasting — these are essentially free money bets on events with 0.8% market probability
